name: Dom Guyot
description: '''Dominic Guyot''' is a Filipino singer and songwriter from [[Cebu City]]. He released his debut album ''Unbeloved'' (2021) and collaborated on "Habangbuhay/Habang Buhay" ({{Translation|Forever/Long Life}}){{Efn|Unless otherwise indicated, the titles of Guyot's songs are stylized in [[all lowercase]].}} with [[Janine Berdin]] in 2023 and on the single "Balik" ({{Translation|Return}}) with [[Adie (Filipino singer)|Adie]] in 2024, followed by the released of "Kabit" in 2025. He is signed to [[UMG Philippines|Republic Records]] and [[Sony Music Philippines]].
